lyric:
["Should old ac quaint ance be for got,
and nev er brought to mind ?
Should;old ac quaint ance be for got,
and days of auld lang syne ?


For auld ;lang; syne, my dear,
for auld; lang; syne,
we'll take a cup of kind ness yet,
for auld ;lang; syne.



","We twa hae run a bout the braes,
And pud the gow ans fine 
But weve wand erd mony a wear y foot,
Sin auld; lang ;syne.","We twa hae paid ld i the burn,
Frae morn ing sun till dine 
But ;seas be tween us braid hae roard
Sin auld; lang ;syne.","And theres a hand, my trust y fiere !
And gies a hand o thine !
 well ;tak a right gude willy wau ght,
For auld; lang; syne."]
lyric_text:
Should old ac quaint ance be for got,
and nev er brought to mind ?
Shouldold ac quaint ance be for got,
and days of auld lang syne ?


For auld lang syne, my dear,
for auld lang syne,
we'll take a cup of kind ness yet,
for auld lang syne.



We twa hae run a bout the braes,
And pud the gow ans fine 
But weve wand erd mony a wear y foot,
Sin auld lang syne.We twa hae paid ld i the burn,
Frae morn ing sun till dine 
But seas be tween us braid hae roard
Sin auld lang syne.And theres a hand, my trust y fiere !
And gies a hand o thine !
 well tak a right gude willy wau ght,
For auld lang syne.
